response.original_title: 1-850-600-1393  How Do I Dispute an Uphold Transaction?{Uphold Transaction}
response.overview: If you need assistance with your account,  ⭐1-850-600-1393 transactions, or wallet-related issues, customer support is available through official support channels. Visit the help center ️ ⭐1-850-600-1393 , start a live chat if available, or submit a support ticket with details about your issue. For faster assistance, have your account information and relevant transaction details ready. Always use the official support  ⭐1-850-600-1393 website to avoid scams and protect your account security.  To submit a dispute or formal complaint to Uphold, use the following methods:Official Web Form: Submit a formal support ticket directly through the Uphold Help Center Request Form.Formal Complaints: If you have an unresolved issue or believe Uphold hasn't handled your account appropriately, you can use the Uphold Register a Complaint Form.
